title: Updated Witch Drops
description: Adds the updated witch drops from version 1.21!
body:
This mod simply adds the updated witch drops introduced in Minecraft 1.21 to versions 1.20 through 1.20.6.

 

## **Drop Details**

When a witch is killed, it will now drop **between 2 and 4 items**, all of which benefit from the **Looting** enchantment.

**Guaranteed Drop:**

*   **Redstone** — Always drops **between 4 and 8**, with up to **+3 extra** from **Looting**.

**Random Additional Drops:**

*   The witch will also drop **1 to 3 random items** from the list below.
*   Each item drops in a quantity between **0 and 2**, with up to **+3 extra** from **Looting**.
*   **Sticks** are **twice as likely** to be chosen compared to the other items.

**Possible Random Drops:**

*   **Sugar** — 0 to 2
*   **Gunpowder** — 0 to 2
*   **Glass Bottle** — 0 to 2
*   **Stick** — 0 to 2 _(more likely)_
*   **Glowstone Dust** — 0 to 2
*   **Spider Eye** — 0 to 2
